Class Anime

java.lang.Object
MediaEntry
Anime
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Anime extends MediaEntry
Represents an anime entry in the media library. Relationships: - Inherits from the MediaEntry superclass. - Adds the number of episodes specific to anime.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Anime

      public Anime(String title, Status status, int rating, String review, int numOfEps)
      Constructor for the Anime class. Initializes the common MediaEntry attributes and the anime-specific episode count.
      Parameters:
      title - the title of the anime
      status - the current status
      rating - the user's rating
      review - the user's review
      numOfEps - the total number of episodes

  • Method Details

    • getMediaType

      public String getMediaType()
      Returns the media type of this entry.
      Specified by:
      getMediaType in class MediaEntry
      Returns:
      "Anime"

    • getNumEps

      public int getNumEps()
      Returns the number of episodes.

    • setNumEps

      public void setNumEps(int numOfEps)
      Updates the number of episodes.
      Parameters:
